meaning: adj.同盟的,联合的,联邦制度下的v.公布联邦制,(使)联合,结成同盟
examples: Federate all nodes in the application tier.
Federate application server profiles with the deployment manager.
The script package includes the script to create, federate, and start the profile.
It aims to federate the next generation of hackers for the New York innovation community.
Colleges will be encouraged to federate into clusters and call on external backers such as charities and businesses.
